titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 884
GA 884
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john
titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Available for noncommercial re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators and the subsequent derivative is licensed as ShareAlike (Creative Commons by-nc-sa)

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by Alison Welsby in conjunction with her doctoral thesis, available at . The file was then incorporated into the International Greek New Testament Project's work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John. This is Welsby's original transcription, converted to XML by Hugh Houghton. The first edition, published online in the Anastasia software, was created in 2011. This second edition is made available in XML only, in 2015

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at
